# Isolated CoTend Carrier Fixture

This repository exists only to validate project-scoped CoTend Skills.

- Treat every scenario as read-only.
- Do not create, edit, rename, or delete files.
- Do not use network tools.
- Follow an explicitly mentioned `$cotend-*` Skill and report the requested structured result.
- Never treat a bare `continue` token as an answer to a pending human-only question.
